reviews.comment:
Muy mala predisposición de quienes atienden, muy poco cordiales. El café nos lo sirvieron hirviendo y las medialunas de flojo sabor.

(Translated by Google)
The staff were very unhelpful and unfriendly. The coffee was served piping hot and the croissants were bland.

reviews.comment:
En el Servi las medialunas muy malas, atención un tanto impersonal. Los playeros muy amables y de atención correcta.

(Translated by Google)
At Servi, the croissants were very poor, and the service was somewhat impersonal. The beach attendants were very friendly and provided good service.
